response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work, and their GIS work uses DLang and Node.js, not the required stack for routing tiling.
strengths: Proven experience with geospatial systems and open-source GIS platforms
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tiling
Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with core tech requirements
Lacks documented experience with routing data pipelines, traffic integration, or map consistency at scale
